text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Hepatitis Testing 20 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TESTING4ALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid HIV testing, syphilis, hepatitis C, and prevention counseling. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 223-5907 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE BANDON FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1010 First Street SE Suite 110 Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 347-2529 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE PORT ORFORD FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 1312 Tichenor Avenue Port Orford, OR 97465 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 332-1114 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE ROSEBURG FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE WINSTON FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides integrated primary and behavioral health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, Hepatitis C screening and treatment, tobacco cessation, support for diabetes, pain management, postpartum mental health, mental health screenings, limited individual counseling, therapy referrals, and vaccinations. 671 SW Main Street Winston, OR 97496 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site (541) 492-4550 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL CITY CONCERN BLACKBURN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, housing, and employment services in one facility. Health care services include: primary care, walk-in care, hepatitis C treatment, mental health treatment, acupuncture, and an on-site pharmacy. Most addiction treatment services including suboxone (no methadone treatments). Transitional, supportive, and permanent housing services also available. 12121 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 18 and older; specific eligibility varies by program Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Walk-ins: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm Pharmacy: Monday-Tuesday/Thursday-Friday 8:30am-5:30pm; Wednesday 9:30am-5:30pm Email (971) 361-7700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The harm reduction program is anonymous, confidential and designed to reduce the risks involved in drug use. Services include safe injection and smoking supplies, including sterile syringes, sharps containers, and many other items. The program also provides access to naloxone, fentanyl test strips and overdose prevention education; connections to same-time medical care, HIV and Hepatitis C testing, vaccines, education, and referral to community resources and services. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: People who use drugs. Must be at least 18 years of age. Hours: Tuesdays, La Pine at 51425 Highway 97, 10am-12pm; Wednesdays, Downtown Bend at 680 NW Bond Street, 9am-11am; Thursdays, Downtown Redmond at 406 West Antler Avenue, 2pm-4pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The harm reduction program is anonymous, confidential and designed to reduce the risks involved in drug use. Services include safe injection and smoking supplies, including sterile syringes, sharps containers, and many other items. The program also provides access to naloxone, fentanyl test strips and overdose prevention education; connections to same-time medical care, HIV and Hepatitis C testing, vaccines, education, and referral to community resources and services. 236 NW Kingwood Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: People who use drugs. Must be at least 18 years of age. Hours: Tuesdays, La Pine at 51425 Highway 97, 10am-12pm; Wednesdays, Downtown Bend at 680 NW Bond Street, 9am-11am; Thursdays, Downtown Redmond at 406 West Antler Avenue, 2pm-4pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY CAVE JUNCTION HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and Hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 200 W Watkins Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Tuesday noon-3pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JOSEPHINE COUNTY GRANTS PASS HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 132 NE B Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday-Friday noon-4pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-7pm, Friday 1pm-5pm. On-demand testing outside scheduled testing times may be arranged by contacting Prevention Manager or Outreach Coordinator. Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential HIV and hepatitis C (HCV) testing. 3855 Wolverine Street NE Suite 6 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Individuals considered to be high-risk for contracting HIV or HCV Hours: Monday/Wednesday 3pm-7pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers testing for HIV and Hepatitis C, as well as a syringe exchange services. Site offers distribution of condoms and first aid supplies. Female condoms available upon request. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies; By appointment only Email (541) 265-0404 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT MULTNOMAH COUNTY HARM REDUCTION CLINIC HARM REDUCTION CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers short-term care for individuals with skin, wound, and soft tissue infections. Provides HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. Other services include syringe exchange, Naloxone distribution, health insurance enrollment, and referral to community resources. 12425 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Primary focus is injection drug users, but anyone can request services Hours: Monday/Thursday 11am-5pm (503) 988-0577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides anonymous and confidential HIV, hepatitis C, and syphilis testing. HIV testing is done by taking a blood or oral sample, with rapid 20-minute test results available for those who qualify. Results are available by phone or in person. Condoms and other safe sex supplies also available. Offers HIV prevention counseling and PrEP (PRe Exposure Prophylaxis) navigation. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: -Standard HIV test: Unrestricted -Rapid HIV test: Men who have or have had sex with men, injection drug users, and partners of people living with HIV -Hepatitis C test: Any individual with a history of injection drug use -Syphilis test: Men who have sex with men, trans folks who may be at risk Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Test Results Line: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-4pm Email (503) 988-3700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors. In addition to safer injection supplies, participants can receive counseling, safer sex information and supplies, free and anonymous HIV testing and Hepatitis C testing, as well as other drug treatment referrals. Outside In's syringe exchange policy is a one for one (1:1) program, meaning users get an even exchange for the amount of syringes they bring in, however no one will be turned away for not having returns. 1219 SW Main Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 535-3826 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors. In addition to safer injection supplies, participants can receive counseling, safer sex information and supplies, free and anonymous HIV testing and Hepatitis C testing, as well as other drug treatment referrals. Outside In's syringe exchange policy is a one for one (1:1) program, meaning users get an even exchange for the amount of syringes they bring in, however no one will be turned away for not having returns. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 535-3826 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUTSIDE IN INJECTION DRUG USERS HEALTH SERVICES NEEDLE EXCHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a syringe exchange to prevent the spread of HIV and other diseases among drug injectors. In addition to safer injection supplies, participants can receive counseling, safer sex information and supplies, free and anonymous HIV testing and Hepatitis C testing, as well as other drug treatment referrals. Outside In's syringe exchange policy is a one for one (1:1) program, meaning users get an even exchange for the amount of syringes they bring in, however no one will be turned away for not having returns. 700 Molalla Avenue Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday 11am-2pm Email (503) 535-3826 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH IMMUNIZATIONS AND STI TESTING/TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services provides adult, child, and infant vaccines. Also, sexually transmitted infection (STI) testing and treatment for: Chlamydia, Syphilis, HIV, Gonorrhea, Hepatitis B, Hepatitis C, and Trichomoniasis 310 NE Kirby Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 434-7525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TESTING4ALL ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE ADAPT INTEGRATED HEALTH CARE FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE CENTRAL CITY CONCERN BLACKBURN CENTER DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HIV ALLIANCE HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HIV ALLIANCE HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HIV ALLIANCE HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HIV ALLIANCE HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HIV ALLIANCE HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HARM REDUCTION CLINIC MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV COMMUNITY TEST SITE OUTSIDE IN NEEDLE EXCHANGE OUTSIDE IN NEEDLE EXCHANGE OUTSIDE IN NEEDLE EXCHANGE YAMHILL COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH IMMUNIZATIONS AND STI TESTING/TREATMENT
